title: hupselos #5308
definition:
1) high, lofty
    1a) exalted on high
    1b) with an uplifted arm, i.e. with signal power
 2) metaph. eminent, exalted
    2a) in influence and honour
    2b) to set the mind on, to seek, high things (as honours and
        riches), to be aspiring
